features.title: GPT-5.5-aware model, skill, and subagent routing
features.summary: Automatically chooses Project Governor skills, subagents, models, and quality gates from the user request.

features.title: Context index and session brief
features.summary: Avoids reading all initialization docs by querying a compact project context index.

features.title: Clean reinstall latest runtime mode
features.summary: Allows clean-reinstall-manager to apply GPT-5.5 runtime mode to current/all governed projects without copying plugin-global assets.
